Our team is dedicated to providing a wide range of clients with world-class services. Bolton White Group is well regarded for its focus on international best practices in all aspects of its business.

Bolton White Group is an independent entrepreneurial-driven institution offering a complete range of hospitality services with a focus on providing a &lsquo;home away from home&rsquo; experience to our clients. By choosing to join Bolton White Group you have assumed your share of the responsibility for maintaining the high principles and standards to which we are dedicated.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel Accountant

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

General Requirements


	Relevant educational qualifications
	3&ndash;5 years of experience in a similar role.
	Strong communication and teamwork skills.
	Excellent customer service orientation.
	Ability to work flexible hours, including weekends and public holidays where required.
	Experience in the hospitality industry is preferred.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Photograph to: jobs@boltonwhitegroup.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Hotel Accountant Job at Bolton White Hotels




        
    

        
        Bolton White Group is a group of hospitality brands providing exceptional services across all our business units. Our team is dedicated to providing a wide range of clients with world-class services. Bolton White Group is well regarded for its focus on international best practices in all aspects of its business.

Bolton White Group is an independent entrepreneurial-driven institution offering a complete range of hospitality services with a focus on providing a ‘home away from home’ experience to our clients. By choosing to join Bolton White Group you have assumed your share of the responsibility for maintaining the high principles and standards to which we are dedicated.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

            
    



Job Position: Hotel Accountant

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

General Requirements


	Relevant educational qualifications
	3–5 years of experience in a similar role.
	Strong communication and teamwork skills.
	Excellent customer service orientation.
	Ability to work flexible hours, including weekends and public holidays where required.
	Experience in the hospitality industry is preferred.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Photograph to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Fleet Management Officer",
  "description": "Verstand Resources Limited - Our client is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fleet Management Officer

Job Locations: Ojota and Ketu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Our client is seeking an experienced Fleet Management Officer to oversee fleet operations, coordinate vehicle maintenance, monitor fleet performance, and ensure compliance with transport and safety regulations.


Key Responsibilities


	Coordinate preventive and corrective vehicle maintenance.
	Schedule vehicle servicing and repairs.
	Monitor fuel consumption, mileage, and vehicleutilisation.
	Maintain accurate fleet records and documentation.
	Track maintenance costs and vehicle performance.
	Monitor insurance, licensing, and regulatory compliance.
	Coordinate drivers and vehicle availability.
	Ensure compliance with transport and road safety regulations.


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE (professional certifications are an advantage).
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in Fleet or Transport Management.
	Valid driver&#39;s licence.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel.
	Strong knowledge of vehicle maintenance.
	Excellent record-keeping and organisational skills.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 / month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@verstandresources.com using &quot;Fleet Management Officer&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Fleet Management Officer Job at Verstand Resources Limited




        
    

        
        Verstand Resources Limited - Our client is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fleet Management Officer

Job Locations: Ojota and Ketu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Our client is seeking an experienced Fleet Management Officer to oversee fleet operations, coordinate vehicle maintenance, monitor fleet performance, and ensure compliance with transport and safety regulations.


Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Coordinate preventive and corrective vehicle maintenance.
	Schedule vehicle servicing and repairs.
	Monitor fuel consumption, mileage, and vehicleutilisation.
	Maintain accurate fleet records and documentation.
	Track maintenance costs and vehicle performance.
	Monitor insurance, licensing, and regulatory compliance.
	Coordinate drivers and vehicle availability.
	Ensure compliance with transport and road safety regulations.


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE (professional certifications are an advantage).
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in Fleet or Transport Management.
	Valid driver's licence.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel.
	Strong knowledge of vehicle maintenance.
	Excellent record-keeping and organisational skills.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 / month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Fleet Management Officer" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Officer",
  "description": "At Kaego, our mission is to inspire, educate and empower individuals through transformative travel experiences that foster cultural understanding, personal growth, and global citizenship.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly creative and results-driven social media officer to join our dynamic team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing our digital presence, crafting engaging content, and growing our community across all major platforms including TikTok, Instagram, Twitter, YouTube, and the company blog.


Key Responsibilities


	Social Media &amp; Content Management
	Video Content Creation
	Twitter Content Management
	Blog Content Creation


Qualifications


	Proven experience in digital marketing and content creation.
	Strong copywriting and storytelling skills.
	Proficiency in video editing tools.
	Solid understanding of social media trends, best practices, and analytics.
	Excellent time management and organizational skills.
	Ability to work independently and remotely with minimal supervision.


Preferred Skills:


	Experience using content planning tools like Notion, Hootsuite, or Later.
	Basic SEO knowledge and keyword research experience.
	Familiarity with analytics platforms (Google Analytics, Meta Insights, TikTok Analytics).


Salary
N50,000 - N100,000/month.",

Social Media Officer Job at Kaego




        
    

        
        At Kaego, our mission is to inspire, educate and empower individuals through transformative travel experiences that foster cultural understanding, personal growth, and global citizenship.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking a highly creative and results-driven social media officer to join our dynamic team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing our digital presence, crafting engaging content, and growing our community across all major platforms including TikTok, Instagram, Twitter, YouTube, and the company blog.


Key Responsibilities


	Social Media & Content Management
	Video Content Creation
	Twitter Content Management
	Blog Content Creation


Qualifications


	Proven experience in digital marketing and content creation.
	Strong copywriting and storytelling skills.
	Proficiency in video editing tools.
	Solid understanding of social media trends, best practices, and analytics.
	Excellent time management and organizational skills.
	Ability to work independently and remotely with minimal supervision.


Preferred Skills:


	Experience using content planning tools like Notion, Hootsuite, or Later.
	Basic SEO knowledge and keyword research experience.
	Familiarity with analytics platforms (Google Analytics, Meta Insights, TikTok Analytics).


Salary
N50,000 - N100,000/month.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Accountant Job at Jeshurun Montessori International School




        
    

        
        Jeshurun Montessori International School is a private educational institution based in Port Harcourt, Rivers State, Nigeria. The school provides student-centered early childhood and foundational education following Montessori principles

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers

Requirements
     

            
    




	B.Sc / HND in Accounting or related field.
	1 – 2 years of experience in a similar role.
	Good knowledge of accounting packages (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage, Zoho Books, Tally).
	Strong analytical and numerical skills.
	Excellent attention to detail and accuracy.
	Good communication and organizational skills.
	Ability to meet deadlines and work under pressure.


Interview Date
Friday, August 14, 2026, at 9:00 AM.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more information or clarifications, contact: 09137184534    

    

        Click here to Apply
